hooks.command: claude -p "Look at the conversation that just ended and update the Changelog table in /Users/mr.ayman/Desktop/aydesignweb.github.io/CLAUDE.md. Add a new row at the TOP of the table (below the header) with today's date ($(date +%Y-%m-%d)) and a 1-2 sentence summary of the key changes made in this session. Only add a row if real changes were made — skip if the session was read-only. Keep existing rows intact." --allowedTools "Read,Edit,Bash"
